article_title: Heating oil customers to get compensation after cancelled orders and price hikes

tasks.prompt: Why are some heating-oil customers receiving compensation?
options: Their existing orders were cancelled and replacement prices were much higher
They ordered the wrong type of boiler
They received more oil than they paid for
They changed their home address without telling suppliers
tasks.correct_answer: Their existing orders were cancelled and replacement prices were much higher
tasks.explanation_hebrew: חלק מהלקוחות נאלצו להתמודד עם ביטול הזמנות קיימות והצעות חדשות במחירים גבוהים בהרבה.

tasks.prompt: About how many customers were reported to be affected by the compensation scheme?
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הדיווח מציין שכ־1,700 לקוחות צפויים לקבל פיצוי.

tasks.prompt: What was the maximum compensation mentioned for an affected customer?
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הפיצוי יכול להגיע עד 350 ליש״ט ללקוח שנפגע.

tasks.prompt: Which organisation investigated the suppliers' behaviour?
tasks.explanation_hebrew: רשות התחרות והשווקים הבריטית, CMA, בדקה את התנהלות הספקים.

tasks.prompt: Why were cancelled orders especially serious for households that rely on heating oil? Answer in 2–4 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Many affected homes depend on delivered oil for heating or hot water
Customers faced either higher replacement prices or a period without oil
Rural or vulnerable households may have limited alternatives

tasks.prompt: How can a sharp rise in wholesale prices create problems for both suppliers and customers? Answer in 2–4 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Customers expect already agreed orders to be honoured
Cancelling and repricing orders transfers risk to customers and can appear unfair

tasks.prompt: What broader weakness did the investigation highlight?
options: Heating-oil customers have fewer formal protections than many other energy consumers
The UK produces no heating oil at all
Every supplier made unusually large profits
Rural households are legally forbidden to change suppliers
tasks.correct_answer: Heating-oil customers have fewer formal protections than many other energy consumers
tasks.explanation_hebrew: החקירה הדגישה את המחסור בהגנות צרכניות מסודרות בשוק שמן ההסקה.

tasks.prompt: Write an 80–120 word summary of the article without copying sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Around 1,700 customers are expected to receive compensation of up to £350
Orders were cancelled during a rapid price increase and some replacement orders cost much more
The CMA investigated suppliers and sought redress
The case prompted calls for stronger regulation and consumer protection

tasks.prompt: Write 2–4 sentences explaining one rule that could protect customers when a supplier wants to cancel a paid or agreed order.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Propose a clear rule such as mandatory notice, automatic compensation, honouring agreed prices, or independent dispute resolution
Explain how the rule would reduce unfairness or uncertainty

tasks.prompt: Write a two-sentence conclusion that connects the compensation decision with the call for future regulation.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: The compensation addresses harm already suffered
New regulation would aim to prevent similar harm and provide clearer standards
